tinyMoments: You're doing better than you think
Sending a virtual hug (it's really tight!)
I'm so lucky to have you.
badDay: It's okay to feel tired. I'm here.
You don't have to be strong all the time.
Today was hard, but it's over now. Rest.

exhausted: You made it through today. That's enough.
Just focus on resting. You've done so much.
Close your eyes for a moment. I'm right here.
stressed: Breathe. One step at a time.
You've handled so much before. You can do this too.
Don't forget to take a break. You deserve it.
okay: I'm glad today wasn't too hard ❤️
Happy to hear you're doing alright.
I hope the rest of your day stays peaceful.
